# Ingantt Help

> Documentation for Ingantt, a project scheduling application.

## Languages

- [English](https://help.ingantt.com/en/llms.txt)
- [Deutsch](https://help.ingantt.com/de/llms.txt)
- [Español](https://help.ingantt.com/es/llms.txt)
- [Français](https://help.ingantt.com/fr/llms.txt)
- [Italiano](https://help.ingantt.com/it/llms.txt)
- [Português](https://help.ingantt.com/pt/llms.txt)
- [Українська](https://help.ingantt.com/uk/llms.txt)
- [日本語](https://help.ingantt.com/ja/llms.txt)
- [한국어](https://help.ingantt.com/ko/llms.txt)
